Bash(python3 -c "
# Check that these are just void-element false positives
with open\('/home/abdul/Desktop/claudeProjects/DataStructures/stack/stack-tutorial-ar.html', 'r'\) as f:
    content = f.read\(\)

# Count opening and closing tags for key structural elements
import re
for tag in ['html', 'head', 'body', 'div', 'section', 'script', 'style']:
    opens = len\(re.findall\(f'<{tag}[\\\\s>]', content, re.IGNORECASE\)\)
    closes = len\(re.findall\(f'</{tag}>', content, re.IGNORECASE\)\)
    status = 'OK' if opens == closes else f'MISMATCH: {opens} opens, {closes} closes'
    print\(f'{tag}: {status}'\)
")
